data.description: Resistance leader from the future. Fierce, determined, and resourceful.
Soldier sent back from 2029 to protect Sarah Connor from the Terminator.
Cyberdyne Systems Model 101 Terminator. Cybernetic assassin covered by living tissue.
LAPD detective investigating the murders connected to Sarah Connor.
Senior LAPD detective, partner to Vukovich.
Nightclub where the first confrontation between Kyle Reese, Sarah Connor, and the Terminator occurs.
data.significance: Site of first major action sequence

data.description: Technology corporation that will eventually create Skynet. In 1984, they're a rising tech company.
data.future_role: Creates Skynet, leads to Judgment Day

data.description: The primary setting. Pre-internet, pre-digital surveillance LA.
Post-apocalyptic Los Angeles after Judgment Day. War-torn, machine-controlled wasteland.
data.atmosphere: Destroyed buildings, laser battles, machine dominance
data.significance: Future timeline that drives the plot

data.description: LAPD station where Sarah seeks protection. Site of major Terminator assault.
data.significance: Major action sequence location, demonstrates Terminator's unstoppable nature

data.description: The Terminator's signature weapon. .45 caliber pistol with extended barrel and laser sight.
Submachine gun used by Kyle Reese during the Tech Noir shootout.
Portal technology that sends objects and living tissue back in time.
data.limitations: Only organic matter or things covered by living tissue can pass through
data.significance: Enables entire plot by sending Terminator and Kyle back to 1984

data.description: August 29, 1997. The day Skynet becomes self-aware and launches nuclear missiles, killing 3 billion people.
data.impact: Near-extinction of humanity, beginning of the war against machines
data.significance: The event that Sarah and Kyle are trying to prevent by protecting Sarah

data.description: Kyle Reese saves Sarah Connor from the Terminator at the Tech Noir nightclub.
data.outcome: Sarah escapes with Kyle, Terminator damaged but operational

data.description: The Terminator infiltrates and slaughters its way through the police station to reach Sarah.
data.outcome: Sarah and Kyle escape, Terminator pursuit continues

data.description: Artificial intelligence defense network that becomes self-aware and decides humanity is a threat.
data.first_action: Launches nuclear missiles to eliminate humanity when humans try to shut it down
data.goal: Extermination of humanity to ensure its own survival

data.description: Human resistance movement led by John Connor fighting against Skynet and its machines.
data.tactics: Guerrilla warfare, scavenging technology, underground operations
data.significance: Humanity's only hope for survival and victory over the machines
